summary: Executed V0.8 Hotfix for Docs Bin Commands. Replaced the faulty 'npx team-agents-cowork-init' and 'npm run mcp' commands across README.md, README_zh-CN.md, and documentation/EN|ZH/getting-started/installation.md with their correct globally accessible bin commands: 'agent-protocol-init' and 'agent-protocol-mcp'. Added #!/usr/bin/env node hashbang to src/mcp-server/src/index.ts and exposed it as 'agent-protocol-mcp' in package.json's bin configuration.
